scripts.db:seed:e2e: pnpm run db:seed && pnpm --filter @metrev/database exec tsx ../../tests/e2e/support/seed-local-runtime.ts
scripts.db:bootstrap:e2e: pnpm run db:migrate:deploy && pnpm run db:seed:e2e
scripts.db:bootstrap: pnpm run db:migrate:deploy && pnpm run db:seed
scripts.db:bootstrap:bigdata: pnpm run db:migrate:deploy && pnpm run db:seed && pnpm --filter @metrev/database bootstrap:bigdata
scripts.test: pnpm run test:js && pnpm run test:python
scripts.local:view:up: env COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME=metrev-local-view POSTGRES_PORT=5436 API_PORT=4012 WEB_PORT=3012 JAEGER_UI_PORT=16689 OTLP_HTTP_PORT=4321 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4012 AUTH_URL=http://localhost:3012 docker compose up --build -d
scripts.local:view:down: env COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME=metrev-local-view POSTGRES_PORT=5436 API_PORT=4012 WEB_PORT=3012 JAEGER_UI_PORT=16689 OTLP_HTTP_PORT=4321 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4012 AUTH_URL=http://localhost:3012 docker compose down
scripts.local:view:status: env COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME=metrev-local-view POSTGRES_PORT=5436 API_PORT=4012 WEB_PORT=3012 JAEGER_UI_PORT=16689 OTLP_HTTP_PORT=4321 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4012 AUTH_URL=http://localhost:3012 docker compose ps
scripts.local:view:start: pnpm run local:view:up && pnpm run local:view:open
